steps.name: Rough Facing
steps.purpose: Level stock top surface and remove raw scale.
steps.parameter_rules: Stepover: 65% of cutter diameter; Depth of cut: 0.050 inch.

steps.name: Finish Facing
steps.purpose: Final pass to achieve precise thickness and surface roughness.
steps.parameter_rules: Depth of cut: 0.010 - 0.015 inch; High feed and high speed.
